title: SIP-AI TEE Attestation Statement
description: A signed statement binding a TEE type and code measurement to a provider's public key. The optional quote_ref points to a raw hardware attestation quote (e.g. Intel DCAP) whose verification is performed by a separate, pluggable verifier.

measurement.description: Hash/identifier of the attested code or enclave, e.g. sha256:...

quote_ref.description: Optional reference (URI/anchor) to the raw hardware attestation quote.
